titleStmt.title: SII 33.132: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 132. (A.R. No. B 235 of 1950.) Bādinēnipalle, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Stone set up at the entrance of the Rāmasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1477, Rākshasa, Pushya śu. 2 corresponding to 1555 A.D., December 15, Sunday. 92.

It registers the grant by the Vipravinōdins, Pedasōmuḍu of Chāṁgalamaṟṟi and Gōvindayya and Mādhavayya of Chennūru, of their professional incomes to the learned mahājanas of Bādinēnipalle alias Tirumalarājapuram situated in Kaṁbhaṁ-sīma. The gift was made on the occasion of (makara) saṅkrānti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 14
77 Aguneṭi rākṣasa saṁvatsa
ra puṣya śu 2 lu śrīmadrājā
dhirājāparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vidyannaga
ramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛ
thvīsāmrājyamu cēyucuṁḍagānu to
ṁḍamārayyaguḷa turimiḷa kaṁbhamusīma
lnōnki celle bādineyinipalleku pratināma
mayina tirumalarājapuramu stita Asēṣavi
dvanmahājanālakuṁnnu vipravinōdulu yi
ccina dharmmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu Ātrēyagō
tramu Āpastaṁbhasūtramu yajuśākhādhyāyu
layina śāgalamari vipravinōdi vallabhayya
suputruṁḍaina pedasōmuṁḍunu kāsyapagō
tramu Āpastaṁbhasūtra yajuśākhādyāyu
ṁḍaina vipravinōdi pedavīrayya putruḍaina pinavīraya
pautṛṁḍaiyina goviṁdayyanu śrīvaccagotramu Āpa
staṁbhasūtramu yajuśākhādhyāyulaina ceṁnūri vi
pravinōdi kēśavayya pautṛḍayina mādhavayya pu
tṛṁḍayina pinamādhavayyanuyi mugu
runnu va sīmalōni toṁḍamārayaguḷḷaku
cellē bādināyani palleku pratināmamayina tirumalarā
japuraṁ stitāśēṣa vidvanmahājanālakuṁnnu yi saṁkrāṁti puṇyaṁ
la maṁdu vipravinōdulakiccē vata 9 nalu mīku trivācakaṁgā
nu trikaraṇa śuddhigānu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu dhāravō
śi yistimigānu mī putra pautra pāraṁparyamu Anubhavi
ṁcēdi yī puṇyānaku ye vipravinōdulu tappinānu
vāraṇāśilōnu gaṁgātīramaṁdu tamatallidaṁḍṟla go
brāṁhmāla vadhiṁcina pāpānabōvuvāru . svadattā dvigu
ṇaṁpuṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇī svada
ttaṁniṣphalaṁ bhavet . śrīlave
rāhi . cennūri vipravinodi goviṁdayya
vrālu . cennūri vipravinodi mādhavayya vrālu .
ḍakka cippa puḍuka .
Digital edition of SII 33.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
